pkgmetadata.longdescription: PyBacklogPy[[CircleCI](httpscircleci.comghkitadakyouPyBacklogPytreemaster.svgstylesvg)](httpscircleci.comghkitadakyouPyBacklogPytreemaster) [BacklogAPI](httpsdeveloper.nulab.comjadocsbacklog) Python - Python 3.5 - typing - Python 3.7.3 [](httpskitadakyou.github.ioPyBacklogPy) pip bashpip install pybacklogpy 21. 1. ____ Backlog3- BacklogComConfigure (backlog.com)- BacklogJpConfigure (backlog.jp)- BacklogToolConfigure (backlogtool.com)ID API - Backlog kitadakyou.backlog.com - API qwertyuiopasdfghjklzxcvbnmqazwsxedcrfvtgbyhnujmikolppythonfrom pybacklogpy.BacklogConfigure import BacklogComConfigurefrom pybacklogpy.Issue import Issue Configure config BacklogComConfigure(space_keykitadakyou, api_keyqwertyuiopasdfghjklzxcvbnmqazwsxedcrfvtgbyhnujmikolp)issue_api Issue(config) API Configure response issue_api.get_issue_list() secrets secrets_sample .gitignore ini[backlog]Host kitadakyou.backlog.comApiKey qwertyuiopasdfghjklzxcvbnmqazwsxedcrfvtgbyhnujmikolpsecrets configure pythonfrom pybacklogpy.Issue import Issueissue_api_2 Issue() Configure response_2 issue_api_2.get_issue_list() configure secrets Wiki API pythonsample.pyfrom pybacklogpy.Wiki import Wikiwiki_api Wiki() API API [PyBacklogPy ](httpskitadakyou.github.ioPyBacklogPy) [BacklogAPI ](httpsdeveloper.nulab.comjadocsbacklog)ID Wiki ID Wiki pythonsample3.pyfrom pybacklogpy.Wiki import Wikiwiki_api Wiki()response wiki_api.add_wiki_page( project_id1000, nameSampleWikiName, content Wiki , mail_notifyFalse,)Wiki pythonsample3.pyfrom pybacklogpy.Wiki import Wikiwiki_api Wiki()response wiki_api.update_wiki_page( wiki_id12345, nameTestWikiName, content , mail_notifyFalse,) [request](httpsrequests-docs-ja.readthedocs.ioenlatest) [](httpsrequests-docs-ja.readthedocs.ioenlatestuserquickstartid3) response.ok Wiki pythonsample4.pyfrom pybacklogpy.Wiki import Wikiwiki_api Wiki()response wiki_api.update_wiki_page( wiki_id12345, nameTestWikiName, content , mail_notifyFalse,)if not response.ok raise ValueError(Wiki ) response.text () JSON json parse Wiki pythonsample5.pyimport jsonfrom pybacklogpy.Wiki import Wikiwiki_api Wiki()response wiki_api.get_wiki_page( wiki_id12345,)if not response.ok raise ValueError(Wiki )wiki_data json.loads(response.text)wiki_name wiki_data[name]wiki_content wiki_data[content] tmp ()1PATH22pythonsample3.pyfrom pybacklogpy.Wiki import Wikiwiki_api Wiki()downloaded_file_path, response self.wiki_attachment.get_wiki_page_attachment( wiki_id12345, attachment_id987654,)print(downloaded_file_path) PullRequest Issue ()PR Twitter [kitadakyou](httpstwitter.comkitadakyou) a
